sourceSummary.oneLine: Schematic page for an ADI gyro circuit using a BMI160 sensor with I2C signals and 3.3 V power.
sourceSummary.officialUse: RA safety submission circuit diagram material.
keyPoints: The main IC shown is U1 BMI160.
Signals include MCU_SCL, MCU_SDA, I2C_ADD_SET, and V3V3_FP.
Connectors CN1 and CN2 are identified as 12505WR-05P.

evidence.claim: The main IC designated U1 is BMI160.

reviewFlags.reason: Title and revision fields in OCR text appear as placeholders rather than populated schematic metadata.
Authority or jurisdiction is not identified in the source text.
Product model HAD1717MC is taken from the source path, while the schematic text itself does not show a product model.
